item.title: SPIKE: Local AI Inference Benchmarks and Device Capability Detection
item.intent: Benchmark MLX Swift vs Core ML for on-device inference, validate device capability detection, and select the local AI framework
item.description: Run inference benchmarks comparing MLX Swift and Core ML on A16 (iPhone 15) and M1 hardware. Test with 1-4GB quantized language models suitable for writing assistance. Measure: first token latency (target <500ms per D-PERF-4), tokens/sec throughput, peak memory usage, and memory-mapped model behavior. Additionally, validate the device capability detection approach (ProcessInfo hardware model → chip family mapping) to correctly identify A16+/M1+ devices. Verify App Store compliance for the model download and inference approach. Blocks FEAT-041 (AI Pipeline). Updates architecture decisions [A-008] and [A-033].
acceptanceCriteria: MLX Swift and Core ML benchmarked on A16 and M1 hardware
First token latency, tokens/sec, and memory measured for each
App Store compliance for model download approach verified
Device capability detection (A16+/M1+ identification) validated on multiple device models
Architecture decisions [A-008] and [A-033] updated based on findings
